name: COLORado 3 Quad Zoom
comment: All the rugged IP65 reliability of our production-grade COLORado family in a fixture featuring the power of lime to achieve better whites and more accurate color rendition. A new RGBL LED source paired with optics optimized for its upgraded zoom system delivers higher output than ever before, from a road-tested design with new touring-friendly features that include backlit buttons for easier work in the dark.
